title: Key Management for DB2
text: Key Management for DB2 Table 1. Primary and Candidate Keys Types of Key Created: Uniface uses the primary key specification to create a primary key with not null specified for the key fields. Candidate keys are identical to unique indexes. Key Creation: The key is created when the table is created, either on the fly or via scripts generated by the Create Table facility. The SQL statement is issued from within the create table statement. Key Names: Key names are constructed using the table name. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
